_doc: A few files exceed the 400-line ceiling for structural reasons. The check still hard-fails on growth past the recorded baseline so each file can't drift further.

exempt._reason: Search Web Worker — title index, inverted/prefix builders, scoring, postMessage protocol, and the new origin-validating init guard all in a single file because Web Workers can't share scope across module boundaries without bundler support. Pinned to 411.

DocsDatabase is the thin delegation facade over the per-domain repos — it accretes one-line pass-throughs as features land (v25 added the chunk-vector tier; §10(B) added hasBodyIndex + resetSemanticCountCaches). Statements live in repos/*; splitting the facade itself would only scatter the delegation map. Pinned to 406.
